blocks.content: Davenport called back eleven minutes later.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: That mark isn't from normal use. Something was drawn across the thumb turn from outside the door — through the gap at the base.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: That gap is half an inch.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Something thin enough to fit. Rigid enough to hook the turn. The mark tells you it happened.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: You're saying they locked the door from the hallway with a tool they brought with them.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: I'm saying the mark says someone locked that door from the outside. What they used — that comes later.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: If they locked the door from the hallway, they walked out through the door.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Which means the locked room was theater.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Planned theater. Something specific enough that whoever did this prepared for it in advance.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: I'll get forensics back on that latch tonight.
He looked at what he'd written.
Door locked from outside. Something through the gap. Figure out what.
He underlined the last three words.
